info.title: Ello.AI API
info.description: API for managing agents and calls in Ello.AI

get.description: Retrieves details of a specific agent by its ID

example.name: My Hybrid Agent2
example.greeting: Hi! How can I assist you today?
example.prompt: You are a helpful AI assistant focused on providing accurate and friendly responses.

message.example: Access denied. Scope does not match
Something went wrong. Please try again later.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of agents (supports filtering and sorting).

message.example: "limit" must be less than or equal to 100
This route requires a user token without scope

post.description: Assigns an existing knowledge base to one or more agents.

parameters.name: kb_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the knowledge base to assign.

assigned_assistant_ids.description: List of agent IDs that the knowledge base was assigned to

assistants_with_kb_count.description: Total number of agents that now have this knowledge base assigned

details.example: Authentication token is missing or invalid

message.example: Knowledge base or agent not found
Something went wrong. Please try again later.

post.description: Removes an existing knowledge base association from one or more agents.

parameters.name: kb_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the knowledge base to unassign.

data.description: List of agent IDs from which the knowledge base was unassigned

details.example: Authentication token is missing or invalid

message.example: This route requires a user token without scope
Knowledge base or agent not found
Something went wrong. Please try again later.

post.description: Creates a single-source knowledge base using either a URL (link) OR one uploaded file (file). Only one source is allowed per request.

workspaceId.description: Optional. If not provided, workspace is taken from the authenticated token.

schema.description: File-based single source knowledge base (only ONE file allowed)

type.description: Must be 'file' when uploading a document

urlName.description: Optional display name for the KB (defaults to file name)

workspaceId.description: Optional. If not provided, workspace is taken from the authenticated token.

message.example: Single source knowledge base created successfully
Single source mode: Please provide either files or a URL
Knowledge base name 'My KB' is already in use. Please choose a different name.
Content unavailable. This link might be private or protected by a security firewall.

details.example: No content retrieved from provided URLs

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of knowledge bases with filters, search, and sorting options.

message.example: "limit" must be less than or equal to 100

delete.description: Deletes a knowledge base by ID. Workspace is derived from the authenticated token (X-Workspace-ID / user token).

parameters.name: kb_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the knowledge base

message.example: This route requires a user token without scope

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the agent initiating the call.

message.example: Hello! Am I speaking to Sri?

details.example: Authentication token is missing or invalid

message.example: Error while publishing message to agent

get.description: Retreives details of a specific call

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter calls by status (e.g. success, failed).

parameters.name: agent_type
parameters.description: Filter calls by agent type (e.g. webcall, phonecall).

details.example: Authentication token is missing or invalid

get.description: Retreives a paginated list of phone numbers

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Number of phone numbers to return per page.

message.example: Failed to get user phone numbers

details.example: Authentication token is missing or invalid

message.example: Error while getting user phone numbers

put.description: Assigns a phone number for a specific agent by their ID.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the agent to assign or update the phone number for.

phone_number.description: The phone number to be assigned or updated for the agent.

200.description: Phone number assigned or updated successfully

message.example: Authentication token is missing or invalid
Error while updating agent phone number

delete.description: Unassigns a phone number from a specific agent

message.example: Error while unassigning phone number from agent
Authentication token is missing or invalid
Error while unassigning phone number from agent

post.description: Creates a new campaign with an uploaded recipients file, linked assistant, and schedule settings.

assistantId.description: The ID of the assistant (agent) associated with this campaign.

scheduleTime.description: Scheduled time for the campaign in ISO format (optional).

scheduleEnabled.description: Set to 'true' to enable scheduling for the campaign (optional).

file.description: CSV file containing the list of recipients for the campaign.

400.description: Bad Request - Missing required fields or invalid input

details.example: Assistant ID is required or No file uploaded

message.example: Authentication token is missing or invalid

422.description: Unprocessable Entity - Error with assistant service or file processing

details.example: Assistant service error or invalid file format

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of created campaigns.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search keyword to filter campaigns by name or other attributes.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter campaigns based on their current status.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of campaigns to return per page.

message.example: Authentication token is missing or invalid

get.description: Retrieves details of a specific campaign by its ID

data.description: Campaign payload returned by the campaign service via gateway.

message.example: Authentication token is missing or invalid

get.description: Retrieves call status for all campaigns with pagination

proxyFailure.value: Failed to fetch Campaigns calls status

message.example: Authentication token is missing or invalid
Error while fetching Campaigns calls status

get.description: Retrieves call status for a specific campaign with pagination

message.example: Authentication token is missing or invalid
Error while fetching campaign call status

get.description: Downloads campaign data as an Excel file

error.description: Present when upstream returns an error body

message.example: Authentication token is missing or invalid
Campaign not found or file not available

internal.value: Internal server error while generating campaign file

get.description: Retrieves detailed statistics and metadata for a specific conversation of a given agent

data.description: Conversation info record returned by assistant-service (fields may include additional keys).

message.example: Authentication token is missing or invalid

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all conversations for a specific agent

pagination.description: Gateway pagination wrapper (may be inaccurate unless upstream provides pagination fields).

message.example: Authentication token is missing or invalid

get.description: Retrieves conversation reports for a specific agent (assistant) with pagination.

items.description: Conversation information record (fields may include additional keys).

noReports.value: No reports found for the given assistant ID

message.example: Authentication token is missing or invalid

get.description: Retrieves paginated transcript entries for a specific conversation

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of transcript entries per page

data.description: Paginated transcript entries (structure depends on stored transcript objects).

message.example: Authentication token is missing or invalid

get.description: Requests an export of conversations for a specific agent. Returns a JSON response (not a binary file stream).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to export

parameters.name: report_type
parameters.description: Type of report to export (all, successful, failed)

data.description: Export result returned by the upstream service (shape depends on upstream).

message.example: Authentication token is missing or invalid
